case_title: ZIP CUBES STORAGE VS. ROSEMARY RINAURO

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY ZIP CUBES STORAGE AS TO DEFENDANT RINAURO, ROSEMARY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-12-2013 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. NO PROOF OF SERVICE. NO APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
